opportunities.title: Software Engineer, Monetization ML Infrastructure
opportunities.description: About the Team   The Monetization team is a new cross-functional group working across engineering, product, research, and design to build the foundational systems that will help OpenAI scale access to intelligence responsibly. Our mission is to develop user-first, privacy-preserving monetization products—including next-generation ads experiences—that strengthen user trust, unlock economic opportunity, and support OpenAI’s long-term innovation. opportunities.title: [HIRING]: Social Media Designer for Cosmetics E-com Brand (Long-Term Opportunity)
opportunities.description:
[HIRING]: Social Media Designer for Cosmetics E-com Brand (Long-Term Opportunity)

We are looking for a creative graphic designer to handle social media post designs for our e-commerce cosmetics stores. We need someone who understands the beauty/cosmetics aesthetic and can create visually stunning, high-converting content. This is a long-term position for the right candidate. opportunities.description:
Sometimes we don't have a job opening that fits your interests or experience. We'd love to receive your resume for our files.

Thank you for your interest in Nelson Motors & Equipment!
